device_name: Empatica Health Monitoring Platform; EmbracePlus; Empatica Care; Care Portal
intended_use: The Empatica Health Monitoring Platform is a wearable device and paired mobile and cloud-based software platform intended to be used by trained healthcare professionals or researchers for retrospectiv
intended_use_full: The Empatica Health Monitoring Platform is a wearable device and paired mobile and cloud-based software platform intended to be used by trained healthcare professionals or researchers for retrospective remote monitoring of physiologic parameters in ambulatory individuals 18 years of age and older in home-healthcare environments. As the platform does not provide real-time alerts related to variation of physiologic parameters, users should use professional judgment in assessing patient clinical stability and the appropriateness of using a monitoring platform designed for retrospective review. The device is intended for continuous data collection supporting intermittent retrospective review of the following physiological parameters: Pulse Rate, Blood Oxygen Saturation under no-motion conditions, Respiratory Rate under no motion conditions, Peripheral Skin Temperature, Electrodermal Activity, Activity associated with movement during sleep.
target_condition: General physiological monitoring for ambulatory patients in home-healthcare environments; not intended for acute arrhythmia detection, apnea detection, or patients with chronic cardiac arrhythmias
ground_truth: FDA-cleared predicate device (K230457, K221282) for comparative performance specifications
other_metrics: Pulse Rate: 3 bpm Arms (no-motion), 5 bpm Arms (motion); Respiratory Rate: 3 brpm Arms; SpO2: 3% Arms; Temperature: ±0.1°C within 30.0°C - 45.0°C range; EDA: 0.01 μS – 100 μS range with 1 digit ~ 55 pS resolution; SpO2 Quality Indicator (proposed ML modification): Sensitivity, Specificity, and False Discovery Rate must be non-inferior to original algorithm, with ≥90% percent agreement with original outputs
